user.title: Add a room
user.description: Pick the cover(s) this automation should control, the lux sensor driving it, and (optionally) a sun-at-window binary sensor. Thresholds, dwell times, calibration, enable, and manual override are configured afterwards as dashboard entities.

data.sun_sensor: Sun-at-window sensor (optional, binary_sensor or true/false sensor)

abort.already_configured: This cover combination is already configured.

data.sun_sensor: Sun-at-window sensor (optional, binary_sensor or true/false sensor)
